title: Rawlings, Menna - Ambassador to France and Monaco, the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Dame Menna Rawlings DCMG CVO left her role at the Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office in July 2025.  President, Queens’ College, University of Cambridge Dame Menna Rawlings DCMG CVO sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Queens’ College, University of Cambridge. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in April 2025; and the appointment was announced in June 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
